stemHtml: According to FCL requirements for the issue of the ATPL(A), of the required 1500 hours of total flight time, the minimum instrument time shall be…

options.a: 100 hours, of which not more than 30 hours may be instrument ground time.
options.b: 75 hours, of which not more than 30 hours may be instrument ground time.
options.c: 150 hours, of which not more than 75 hours may be instrument ground time.
options.d: 75 hours, of which not more than 20 hours may be instrument ground time.
